# Calendario HDP (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: sjz-z4c-hrx.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/hotel/gb/the-ned_london
2. Scroll down to the accomodations lista
3. Click to the check-in field to open the date picker
4. Click the arrow to navigate to the next month
5. Click the arrow to navigate to the next month
6. Click the arrow to navigate to the next month
7. Select date 4 in the second month of the calendar
8. Select date 7 in the second month of the calendar
9. Wait until rooms are fully loaded
